title: Archive closed tasks: delete from HEAD, let git be the archive
description: When a task is closed, delete its JSON file from .ball/tasks/ after committing the close. Old tasks live in git history. Update parent tasks with a closed_children field for completion tracking. bl list --all and bl show for archived tasks can optionally dig into git log but is not required. This eliminates the need for compaction entirely.

notes.author: mark
notes.text: Archive closed tasks: delete from HEAD, parent tracks closed_children, git history is the archive
